differential_diagnoses: Heavy metal poisoning (e.g., lead or arsenic)
next_steps: Send stool for Clostridium botulinum toxin and culture
Consider administration of Botulism Immune Globulin (BabyBIG)
Perform electrodiagnostic studies (repetitive nerve stimulation and EMG)
Assess for exposure to honey, corn syrup, or environmental dust
Perform ophthalmologic examination and cranial nerve testing
Send serum for heavy metal screening and autoimmune panel for myasthenia gravis

differential_diagnoses: Congenital myasthenia gravis / Transient neonatal myasthenia
next_steps: Obtain stool for C. botulinum toxin and culture
Perform electrodiagnostic studies (repetitive nerve stimulation and EMG)
Perform meticulous search for a tick in skin folds and scalp
MRI spine with contrast to evaluate for transverse myelitis or spinal cord inflammation
Perform ophthalmologic exam to assess for fixed pupils or ophthalmoplegia
Obtain serum metabolic panel including ammonia, lactate, pyruvate, and acylcarnitine profile
